posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml:
In case you missed it, monday WorkCanvas is out of Beta!

WorkCanvas, allows you to plan, brainstorm, and visualize any workflow or project in one collaborative whiteboard that syncs directly with your monday.com boards.

For example, you are able to create visual assets such as, mindmaps, org charts, SWOT analysis, and more! The creators of monday WorkCanvas will take you through different use cases and examples of monday WorkCanvas. Join our upcoming webinar and get ready to unlock a world of potential!
